calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order Of Conveyance Pursuant To Probate Code 850
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Clune for (petitioner) Mary Gallagher.

The Court stated that it is confused as to why this is before a California Court. Mr. Clune stated that there are Schwab assets in the California trust, that the 1999 trust was revoked and replaced by the 2010 trust, that it is sufficient under the code and the terms of the trust, that they have noticed all beneficiaries of both trusts, that everyone is aware of the specific remedy sought, that no one is contesting, that it is a small trust and that they are trying to preserve the funds by minimizing court proceedings. The Court stated that the argument is predicated on the 2010 trust being valid, that it is putting the cart before the horse, that it assumes that the 2010 trust is valid, that Schwab has offices worldwide and this does not have to be done in California, that it is a Texas trust with assets in Texas and that the court is either going to deny the petition without prejudice or continue the matter for further argument. Mr. Clune stated that the 1999 trust was governed by California law not Texas law. The Court stated that it is not going to grant the petition. Mr. Clune stated that they consulted with individuals in Texas, that Texas will not do anything until a California court says that the 1999 trust is not valid. The Court asked isn't your argument that the 1999 trust is not valid because of the 2010 trust and stated that Texas law is the law that governs the trust. Mr. Clune stated that all they need is a declaration that the 1999 trust is revoked because the settlor delivered the documents to himself. The petition for an order of conveyance pursuant to probate code 850 was taken under submission.

Subsequent to the hearing it was decided that this matter will be deemed under submission as of March 28, 2016. The parties will be notified to address the remaining procedural issues.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Macksoud. (Not Reported)

Petition For An Order Of Conveyance Pursuant To Probate Code 850
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Continued To Feb-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
